title: Project Telos Social Posting Run Manifest Claims

claims.text: The social posting run manifest records that the previously referenced social wave packet paths are absent from the current filesystem state.
claims.falsification: The manifest claims the older social packet paths are currently present or omits the current-state repair context.

claims.text: The manifest provides an immediate dispatch batch with exact text for 8 public comments across Reddit, YouTube, dev.to, and Hacker News.
claims.falsification: The manifest lacks exact text, URLs, or platform coverage for the immediate dispatch batch.

claims.text: The immediate dispatch batch contains no Project Telos repository link and is framed around technical value rather than link promotion.
claims.falsification: The manifest includes a Project Telos repository link in the immediate batch.

claims.text: The manifest requires action-time confirmation before public posting and explicitly says not to claim posts until the public side effect completes.
claims.falsification: The manifest authorizes posting without exact confirmation or claims public comments have already been posted.

claims.text: The manifest keeps quant/trading comments framed as engineering validation rather than investment advice.
claims.falsification: The manifest recommends trades, predicts returns, or suggests deploying capital.
